/usr/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/ofd_post.dir/post/calcFar1d.c.o CMakeFiles/ofd_post.dir/post/calcFar2d.c.o CMakeFiles/ofd_post.dir/post/calcNear1d.c.o CMakeFiles/ofd_post.dir/post/calcNear2d.c.o CMakeFiles/ofd_post.dir/post/ev2d.c.o CMakeFiles/ofd_post.dir/post/ev2dlib.c.o CMakeFiles/ofd_post.dir/post/ev3dlib.c.o CMakeFiles/ofd_post.dir/post/outputFar0d.c.o CMakeFiles/ofd_post.dir/post/outputFar1d.c.o CMakeFiles/ofd_post.dir/post/outputFar2d.c.o CMakeFiles/ofd_post.dir/post/outputNear1d.c.o CMakeFiles/ofd_post.dir/post/outputNear2d.c.o CMakeFiles/ofd_post.dir/post/planewave.c.o CMakeFiles/ofd_post.dir/post/plot2dFar0d0.c.o CMakeFiles/ofd_post.dir/post/plot2dFar1d0.c.o CMakeFiles/ofd_post.dir/post/plot2dFeed.c.o CMakeFiles/ofd_post.dir/post/plot2dFreq.c.o CMakeFiles/ofd_post.dir/post/plot2dFreq0.c.o CMakeFiles/ofd_post.dir/post/plot2dIter.c.o CMakeFiles/ofd_post.dir/post/plot2dNear1d0.c.o CMakeFiles/ofd_post.dir/post/plot2dNear2d0.c.o CMakeFiles/ofd_post.dir/post/plot2dPoint.c.o CMakeFiles/ofd_post.dir/post/plot3dFar2d.c.o CMakeFiles/ofd_post.dir/post/plot3dFar2d0.c.o CMakeFiles/ofd_post.dir/post/plot3dNear2d0.c.o CMakeFiles/ofd_post.dir/post/post.c.o CMakeFiles/ofd_post.dir/post/post_data.c.o CMakeFiles/ofd_post.dir/post/readhdf5.c.o CMakeFiles/ofd_post.dir/post/readout.c.o CMakeFiles/ofd_post.dir/sol/nearfield_c.c.o CMakeFiles/ofd_post.dir/sol/farfield.c.o CMakeFiles/ofd_post.dir/sol/outputCoupling.c.o CMakeFiles/ofd_post.dir/sol/utils.c.o CMakeFiles/ofd_post.dir/sol/ev3d.c.o CMakeFiles/ofd_post.dir/src/post_Main.c.o -o /home/user/OpenFDTD/bin/ofd_post  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/hdf5/serial -lm /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/13/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/hdf5/serial/libhdf5.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsz.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libdl.a -lm
